creator: volker@vwsoft.com
text:
Christophe,

please send us the following information:

uname -a
dmesg (with verbose boot)
fsck -y
atacontrol mode ad6
atacontrol cap ad6

and if you're not running a GENERIC kernel, please show us your kernel
config.

Also please tell us exactly the cvs tag you have used.

And please send output of `smartctl -a /dev/ad6' (requires smartmontools
from ports).

Thanks!
